UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile information, linked to an external authentication system. Does not store sensitive authentication credentials like passwords.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

externalAuthId.description: Identifier for the user in the external authentication system. (Relationship: External Auth 1:1 UserProfile)

firstName.description: The first name of the user.

lastName.description: The last name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user, used for communication.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user profile was last updated.

BankAccount.title: BankAccount
BankAccount.description: Represents a user's bank account with balance and other details.

id.description: Unique identifier for the BankAccount entity.

iban.description: The International Bank Account Number (IBAN) for the account.

balance.description: The current monetary balance of the account.

currency.description: The currency of the account balance (e.g., EUR, USD).

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who owns this bank account. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N BankAccount)

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the bank account was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the bank account details were last updated.

Card.title: Card
Card.description: Represents a bank card associated with a bank account. Only stores display information, not full card numbers or CVVs for security.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Card entity.

cardNumberLastFour.description: The last four digits of the card number, used for identification and display.

cardHolderName.description: The name of the cardholder as it appears on the card.

expirationDate.description: The expiration date of the card in MM/YY format.

cardType.description: The type of card (e.g., 'Visa Debit', 'Mastercard Credit').

status.description: The current status of the card (e.g., 'Active', 'Blocked', 'Cancelled').

bankAccountId.description: Reference to the BankAccount this card is associated with. (Relationship: BankAccount 1:N Card)

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the card record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the card record was last updated.

Transaction.title: Transaction
Transaction.description: Records details of a financial transaction, such as a transfer, deposit, or withdrawal.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Transaction entity.

amount.description: The monetary amount of the transaction.

currency.description: The currency of the transaction amount (e.g., EUR, USD).

description.description: An optional description or memo for the transaction.

transactionDate.description: The date and time when the transaction occurred or was initiated.

status.description: The current status of the transaction (e.g., 'Pending', 'Completed', 'Failed', 'Cancelled').

senderAccountId.description: Reference to the BankAccount from which the funds were sent.

beneficiaryName.description: The name of the individual or entity receiving the funds.

beneficiaryIban.description: The IBAN of the beneficiary account.

beneficiaryBic.description: The BIC/SWIFT code of the beneficiary bank.

beneficiaryBankName.description: The name of the beneficiary's bank.

beneficiaryAddress.description: The physical address of the beneficiary (required for international compliance).

fee.description: Service fees applied to the transaction.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

definition.description: Stores bank account details for a specific user.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns this bank account.

params.name: bankAccountId
params.description: The unique identifier for the bank account.

definition.description: Stores card information associated with a specific bank account.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns the associated bank account.

params.name: bankAccountId
params.description: The unique identifier of the bank account this card belongs to.

params.name: cardId
params.description: The unique identifier for the card.

definition.description: Records details of financial transactions (virements) for a specific bank account.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns the associated bank account.

params.name: bankAccountId
params.description: The unique identifier of the bank account relevant to this transaction.

params.name: transactionId
params.description: The unique identifier for the transaction.
